debug_info.goal:
d : Type u_4
inst✝¹ : Fintype d
inst✝ : DecidableEq d
ρ : MState d
ψ : Ket d
⊢ ρ.exp_val ↑(MState.pure ψ) = 1 ↔ ρ = MState.pure ψ

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
constructor
  · intro h
    have h_inner : (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M).inner (ρ.M - (pure ψ).M) = 0 := by
      rw [HermitianMat.inner_sub_sub]
      simp only [MState.exp_val] at h
      have h1 : ρ.M.inner ρ.M ≤ 1 := by
        calc ρ.M.inner ρ.M 
            ≤ ρ.M.trace * ρ.M.trace := ρ.M.inner_le_mul_trace ρ.zero_le ρ.zero_le
          _ = 1 * 1 := by rw [ρ.normalized]
          _ = 1 := by ring
      have h2 : (pure ψ).M.inner (pure ψ).M = 1 := by
        simp [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self]
      linarith
    ext
    have := HermitianMat.inner_self_eq_zero.mp h_inner
    exact sub_eq_zero.mp this
  · intro h
    rw [h, MState.exp_val]
    simp [HermitianMat.inner, MState.pure_mul_self]
